name: cmpa-project
description: TrackWave is a music platform that is an alternative to Multitracks. The catcher is, it is designed for all genres, instead of mainly worship music. It's a website where users can explore, upload, and access multitrack audio for different types of music like rap, r&b and many more. The goal is to  make this feel real and functional, so producers oridinary people or even musicians will find this super helpful and high-quality.
